home.title: Connect qualified tutors with recruiters securely.
home.subtitle: Browse verified tutors, manage activity status, and keep sensitive contact details protected until admin approval.

steps.1: Tutors sign up and complete profiles.
steps.2: Recruiters register to view tutor details.
steps.3: Admin approves access to contact information.
steps.4: Admin manages messages, monitoring, and trust.

adminOversight.title: Admin oversight
adminOversight.description: One admin controls recruiter approval, contact access, messages, and content moderation.

weeklyStatus.title: Weekly tutor status
weeklyStatus.description: Tutors update activity each week so recruiters can find available educators.

protectedContact.title: Protected contact detail
protectedContact.description: Contact information is hidden until admin approves the recruiter's request.

footer.desc: Connecting qualified tutors with recruiters securely and efficiently across Rwanda.
footer.tagline: Empowering education, one match at a time.
